mapper.select: select /* kr.or.ddit.domain.central.admin.mapper.IAplctMapper.selectAplctList */ a.APLCT_NO , a.ANN_NO , a.USER_NO , a.HO_TY_NO , a.REG_DT , a.MDF_DT , a.APLCT_STTS_CD , a.RJCT_RSN_CN , b.TTL , m.USER_ID , m.USER_NM , h.APT_CMPLEX_NO , h.TY_NM , h.EXCLUSIVE_SIZE , h.ROOM_CNT , h.BATHROOM_CNT , d.SBMSN_DOC_NO , d.SBMSN_DOC_TY_CD , d.REG_DT as DOC_REG_DT , d.MDFCN_DT as DOC_MDF_DT , d.ATCH_FILE_ID , f.FILE_GROUP_NO , f.FILE_OG_NAME , f.FILE_SAVE_UUID , f.FILE_PATH , f.FILE_EXT , f.FILE_SIZE , f.GOOGLE_ID , f.MIME_TYPE , f.FILE_SORT_ORDER from APLCT a inner join APT_HO_TY h on (a.HO_TY_NO = h.HO_TY_NO) inner join CENTER_ANN_BOARD_POST b on (b.ANN_NO = a.ANN_NO) inner join MEMBER m on (m.USER_NO = a.USER_NO) left outer join SBMSN_DOC d on (d.APLCT_NO = a.APLCT_NO) left outer join ATTACH_FILE f on (d.ATCH_FILE_ID = f.FILE_GROUP_NO)

select /* kr.or.ddit.domain.central.admin.mapper.IAplctMapper.getRentLstgNoByAplctNo */ r.RENT_LSTG_NO from APLCT A inner join CENTER_ANN_BOARD_POST ANN on(A.ANN_NO = ANN.ANN_NO) inner join RENT_LISTING R on(R.ANN_NO = ANN.ANN_NO) where A.APLCT_NO = #{aplctNo} and R.DEAL_STTS_CD = 'AVL'
mapper.update: update RENT_LISTING set DEAL_STTS_CD = 'ING' where RENT_LSTG_NO = #{rentLstgNo}
